title: Fix docker-compose.dev.yml to use bun instead of npm
description: docker-compose.dev.yml:29 uses `npm run build:all && node dist/http-server.js` inside a Bun-built image (oven/bun:1-slim). npm is not installed, and dist/http-server.js doesn't exist. Change to `bun run build:all && bun run dist/http-server.mjs`.
validation: Read docker-compose.dev.yml, confirm command uses bun and points to .mjs file.
